description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a broad chest and defined arms, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in tight athletic pants featuring a bold graphic design on the thighs, and wears wristbands and tall boots. The figure's facial features are stern and chiseled, with a strong jawline and short, neatly styled hair. The upper body is bare, revealing detailed musculature and a natural skin texture. The pants are form-fitting and the boots are sturdy, suggesting an athletic or performance-oriented context. The overall appearance is that of a professional wrestler or athlete prepared for competition.
description: A muscular adult male in athletic pants, wristbands, and boots, with a bare upper body and short styled hair. The figure has a strong, athletic build and a stern expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular chest, abs, facial features, and graphic design on the pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the contour of the torso and boots.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the broad back, arm muscles, and the rear design of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic pants with graphic design, wristbands, and tall performance boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
